name: Class Siblings Lord Choice
_source: if;[field[1] for field in DB.classes.get('{v:SiblingKlass}').fields if field[0] == 'ClassSkill'][0]

textbox;ClassInfoTable;<yellow>Weapons:</> {e:', '.join(w for w in DB.classes.get('{v:SiblingKlass}').wexp_gain if DB.classes.get('{v:SiblingKlass}').wexp_gain[w].usable == True)}{br}<yellow>Growth Rate Changes:</>{br}<green>{e:[field[1] for field in DB.classes.get('{v:SiblingKlass}').fields if field[0] == 'Strengths'][0]}</>, <red>{e:[field[1] for field in DB.classes.get('{v:SiblingKlass}').fields if field[0] == 'Weaknesses'][0]}</>{br}<yellow>Class Skills:</> {e:[field[1] for field in DB.classes.get('{v:SiblingKlass}').fields if field[0] == 'ClassSkill'][0]}{br}<yellow>Constitution:</> {e:u(v('SiblingNid')).stats['CON']};bottom_left;150;6;;0.25

textbox;ClassInfoTable;<yellow>Weapons:</> {e:', '.join(w for w in DB.classes.get('{v:SiblingKlass}').wexp_gain if DB.classes.get('{v:SiblingKlass}').wexp_gain[w].usable == True)}{br}<yellow>Growth Rate Changes:</>{br}<green>{e:[field[1] for field in DB.classes.get('{v:SiblingKlass}').fields if field[0] == 'Strengths'][0]}</>, <red>{e:[field[1] for field in DB.classes.get('{v:SiblingKlass}').fields if field[0] == 'Weaknesses'][0]}</>{br}<yellow>Class Skills:</> None{br}<yellow>Constitution:</> {e:u(v('SiblingNid')).stats['CON']};bottom_left;150;6;;0.25
